login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to access your manuscripts and collaborative workspaces.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Create your Studio profile to manage manuscripts and collaborate with other contributors.

orcid.label: ORCID
orcid.hint: Optional. You may enter either the identifier or a complete ORCID URL.

password.label: Password
password.hint: Use at least 8 characters, including a letter and a number.

errors.invalidCredentials: The e-mail address or password is incorrect.
errors.userNotFound: The user account could not be found.
errors.accountNotActive: This user account is not active.
errors.authenticationRequired: You must sign in to access the Studio.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account already exists with this e-mail address.
errors.passwordTooShort: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordNeedsLetter: The password must contain at least one letter.
errors.passwordNeedsNumber: The password must contain at least one number.

auth.alphaNotice: Local alpha authentication. Accounts and credentials are currently stored only in this browser.
